GenAiFunction.description: Creates a native Salesforce report via the Analytics API. Requires: reportName, reportType (from List Report Types), columns (from Get Report Type Columns). Supports three formats: TABULAR (default), SUMMARY (with groupingsDown), MATRIX (with groupingsDown and groupingsAcross). Optional: single filter (filterColumn/filterOperator/filterValue), multi-filter (filtersJson), dateFilter (e.g., CLOSE_DATE:THIS_FISCAL_YEAR), scope (user/organization), folderName. Returns reportUrl, reportId, reportPath, reportName, success, errorMessage.
